self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep the canonical truth anchor useful by resolving the stable historical Runtime record family directly instead of throwing unsupported-path errors.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result adds a read-only legacy Runtime record compatibility path to the shared state resolver.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, direct report focus on the historical `runtime/legacy-records/*-runtime-record.md` family still threw unsupported-path errors.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future report and composition work can inspect those historical Runtime records directly without reconstructing their state by hand.

decision.rationale: The shared truth anchor should resolve the stable historical Runtime record family as read-only artifacts instead of throwing.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
